21.reason: [Error: For digit expansion, printf("%d",j) prints the integer value of j (e.g., 49 for '1'), not the character. Should use printf("%c",j) to output the digit character.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: For digit expansion, printf("%d",j) prints the integer value of j (e.g., 49 for '1'), not the character. Should use printf("%c",j) to output the digit character.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: For digit expansion, printf should use "%c" to print the character, not "%d" which prints the integer value. This will output the ASCII code instead of the digit character.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [should be %c to print character, not its ASCII value]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Should use %c to print the character, not %d. Using %d will print the ASCII integer value instead of the character.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Logical error: "%d" format specifier prints the integer ASCII value instead of the character. Should be "%c".
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Uses %d format specifier which prints integer ASCII values instead of characters; should be %c.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Should use "%c" instead of "%d" to print characters, not integers]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Should use "%c" instead of "%d" to print characters, not integers]

7.reason: [Error: gets() is deprecated and unsafe; use fgets() instead. In strict C11/C17, it may cause compilation error.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: gets() is deprecated and unsafe; use fgets() instead. In strict C11/C17, it may cause compilation error.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  gets() is removed in the C11 standard and causes compilation errors in modern compilers. Use fgets() or scanf() instead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  gets() is deprecated and removed in the C11 standard, which causes compilation errors in modern environments; use fgets() instead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it was removed in C11 and causes compilation errors with modern compilers]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it was removed in C11 and causes compilation errors with modern compilers]
